title: Array Index Out of Bounds Bug Fix for Missing Max

statement.markdown: Given an array of integers, find the maximum element present more than once.
statement.inputFormat: Input is an array of integers.
statement.outputFormat: Output should be the maximum number present more than once. If no such number exists, return -1.
statement.notes: Write a solution that handles edge cases and avoids potential ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException.

examples.explanation: There are two occurrences of the number 2.
There are no numbers present more than once.

editorial.title: Array Index Out of Bounds Bug Fix for Missing Max Editorial
editorial.intuition: The problem asks to find the maximum number present more than once in the array.
editorial.bruteForce: Brute force approach would involve iterating through the array and checking each number against all other numbers. This results in a time complexity of O(n^2).
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution involves using a HashMap to count the frequency of each number in the array, and then iterating through the array again to find the maximum number present more than once.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The correctness of the optimal solution can be proven by considering all possible cases, including the case where no number is present more than once.
